title: Squirrel Removal in Cedarhurst, NY | $900-$2,500

intro: Squirrels invading your Cedarhurst attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Cedarhurst and the Five Towns area. Our experienced technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions to protect your Long Island home from squirrel damage.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Cedarhurst homeowners for years with licensed, insured squirrel removal specialists who understand the unique challenges of Long Island's residential properties. We offer same-day emergency service, humane wildlife solutions, and guaranteed results to keep your Cedarhurst home squirrel-free.
localContext: Cedarhurst's beautiful tree-lined streets and mature oak trees near Cedarhurst Park create ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking entry into attics and crawl spaces. The area's mix of vintage Tudor homes and modern residences along Central Avenue requires specialized squirrel-proofing techniques to prevent recurring infestations.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Cedarhurst?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Cedarhurst typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage repair needed. This includes humane trapping, full property inspection, exclusion work, and sanitation of affected areas.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Cedarhurst home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Cedarhurst and can typically begin trapping within 24 hours of your call. Complete removal usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels, followed by exclusion work to seal all entry points and prevent future invasions.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Cedarhurst homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause extensive damage to Cedarhurst homes including chewed electrical wiring (fire hazard), damaged insulation, torn roof vents and soffits, contaminated attics from droppings, and structural wood damage. They often enter through roof edges, gable vents, and chimney caps common in Long Island architecture.

faqs.question: Do you offer humane squirrel removal in Cedarhurst?
faqs.answer: Yes, we exclusively use humane live-trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. After safely capturing squirrels from your Cedarhurst property, we relocate them to approved areas and seal all entry points to prevent re-entry, ensuring a permanent and ethical solution.
